overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night along a narrow dirt path beside a large rock formation. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, ending as the player approaches a small wooden structure in a clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail between rock cliff and dense vegetation

dense green bushes and trees lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow forest path at night, bordered by a large rock cliff on the right and dense vegetation on the left. The ground is a dirt trail covered with leaves, and the scene is dimly lit with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest clearing with small wooden structure

events.description: small wooden shed becomes visible in the distance as the path opens into a clearing

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the wooden structure now visible ahead in the clearing

entered.detail: small dark wooden structure with a triangular roof situated in the forest clearing ahead

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the path opens into a small clearing where a wooden shed becomes visible in the distance. The rock cliff continues along the right side while the vegetation on the left recedes slightly, revealing more of the dark night sky above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a claustrophobic forest trail that gradually opens into a small, desolate clearing. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt path covered in leaves, tightly bordered by a towering rock cliff on the right and dense, dark vegetation on the left. As the camera pushes forward through the dim light and low visibility, the oppressive greenery on the left begins to recede. The scene then expands as the path leads out of the thicket, revealing more of the dark night sky above. Finally, the perspective opens fully to reveal a solitary wooden shed standing in the distance.
